Firestore Rules.description: Copy and paste these rules into your Firebase Console > Firestore Database > Rules tab
Firestore Rules.security_level: Production-Ready - Users can only access their own data

Realtime Database Rules.description: Copy and paste these rules into your Firebase Console > Realtime Database > Rules tab
Realtime Database Rules.security_level: Production-Ready - Users can only access their own data

Security Features.user_isolation: Each user can ONLY read/write their own data using userId validation
Security Features.no_cross_user_access: Users cannot access, modify, or delete other users' data
Security Features.admin_protection: Only admin users can manage jobs collection
Security Features.profile_protection: Users cannot accidentally delete their own profiles
Security Features.default_deny: All paths not explicitly allowed are denied by default
Security Features.data_validation: Realtime Database validates required fields on write
